text: Looking at the 5 million sales for Rebirth, it mathematically proves that nobody cares about turn-based RPGs anymore and the genre is factually dead.
label: hot_take
notes: Borderline analysis due to stat usage, but the conclusion is pure hyperbole, making it a hot take.

text: My mind is literally blown that they somehow got the dodge roll startup down to 12 frames in that engine!!!
label: reaction
notes: Mentions technical frame data, but the framing is entirely an emotional reaction rather than an argument.

text: I am literally crying at how bad this stream is. Geoff Keighley has single-handedly destroyed the gaming industry forever.
label: hot_take
notes: Starts as a reaction, but the sweeping subjective accusation about ruining the industry pushes it into hot take territory.

text: Sony's state of play was a complete disaster from a pacing perspective. You don't open a showcase with a 5v5 hero shooter that looks identical to Overwatch, especially when the market is already completely oversaturated with live-service games.
label: analysis

text: The input delay in the Elden Ring DLC makes the final boss mechanically unfair, not just 'hard'. When boss attack animations are 12 frames but the dodge roll startup is 14 frames, you are relying on luck instead of reaction time.
label: analysis

text: Xbox is completely dead as a console manufacturer. Putting their biggest games on PlayStation just proves they lost the console war and have no idea what they are doing anymore.
label: hot_take

text: Breath of the Wild ruined the Zelda franchise. This new game just looks like more physics sandbox garbage instead of a real, structured Zelda game with proper dungeons.
label: hot_take

text: Arrowhead got lucky with Helldivers 2. Every single patch they've released since launch has actively made the game worse, and the player base is going to be completely dead by the fall.
label: hot_take

text: Geoff Keighley has completely ruined the Summer Game Fest. It's just a giant, overpriced billboard for mobile games now.
label: hot_take

text: Nobody actually wants to play as Zelda. Nintendo is just pandering, and it's going to be the worst-selling game on the Switch.
label: hot_take

text: ZELDA IS FINALLY THE MAIN CHARACTER I AM LITERALLY SCREAMING RIGHT NOW!!!
label: reaction

text: Just saw the new DOOM trailer. The shield saw is the greatest video game weapon ever created. Day one purchase.
label: reaction

text: Man, I'm just so exhausted with modern gaming. Every time I find a game I like, it gets ruined by some live-service update.
label: reaction

text: I can't believe they actually pulled it off. This is the best gaming event I've watched in five years.
label: reaction

text: RIP to my wallet this fall, too many good games coming out all at once.
label: reaction

text: Man, this non-E3 week has been great with trailers of many high profile games!
label: reaction

text: I don’t think it was a bad show by any means, just… I wasn’t surprised by any of it? I figured more RE remakes were coming, I swear I read Alien Isolation 2 was in development a few weeks ago... A lot of trailers for games we’ve already heard about.
label: analysis

text: Thats always gonna be the state of major shows going forward. Stuff is leaked and so rapidly spread that you can't help but hear of it, and in order to prevent that these days, all the companies outright spell out whats gonna be revealed with hints.
label: analysis

text: Tupac was the most surprising reveal to me
label: reaction

text: Having him and Snoop just breaks immersion so much. It's disappointing because everything else looks so great
label: reaction

text: This isnt really new though. Yakuza has been doing this pretty much from the start, the difference is that you dont recognize the japanese celebrities present throughout most of them. As theyre now more internationally appealing, theyre using more international celebrities.
label: analysis

text: I’m so bored with games incorporating real people into them for that exact reason. Even when games make the characters look like the people voicing them it’s just immersion breaking to me. It just seems lazy.
label: hot_take

text: Honestly youre a fool to have done it in the first place, why would anyone sit down to watch 2 hours of straight ads
label: hot_take

text: i mean there were a lot of interesting announcements but I honestly can't stand this kind of show anymore. So many CGI trailer with zero actual gameplay and then some dev comes on the stage and spews some buzzwords that tell you absolutely nothing. I prefer the way Sony and Nintendo handle their shows with games usually only revealed when there is actual gameplay.
label: analysis

text: I think a lot of people are just hate-watching, waiting for validation to go on a rant online.
label: hot_take

text: Man I am so sick of fantasy action games with a focus on heavy strike combat
label: reaction

text: Wrong! 1 billion more bland UE5 soulslikes for you
label: hot_take

text: the kingdom hearts wait is so depressing
label: reaction

text: VERONICA LETS FUCKING GOOOO
label: reaction

text: Blown away they deleted the record of the live stream for their own event. Absolutely braindead decision. I looked forward to this all week but I guess since I worked when the show was going I dont get to watch it.
label: reaction

text: I hate that the game industry now is just "Popular Game: A Million Times Over". I know that in the late 90s mascot platformers had this same thing, but its just the most prevelant development cycle now. Every game has to be Elden Ring because they failed at making every game Fortnite, which they tried after failing to make every game The Last of Us.
label: analysis

text: Way too much horror imo. Four things I don´t like: horror, souls games, jrpgs, multiplayer. Seems like each conference is fuller and fuller of these.
label: reaction

text: Final Fantasy 7 Part 3 is the GTA of jrpgs
label: hot_take

text: Jesus, the anti-Japanese gaming sentiment is not only insanely stupid but just shows lack of ability to engage with a broad range of gameplay systems / stories
label: hot_take

text: Which is bizarre at a time when every western studio is trying to do God of War 2018 cinemaslop and every Japanese studio has simultaneously learned how to make good PC ports AND are experimenting and pushing the medium forward like crazy.
label: analysis

text: Originality, gameplay I've never seen before that makes me say, "Okay, that's what the future of video games should look like." Playing the same old type of games forever is a waste of time and life.
label: hot_take

text: It wasn't that bad but it wasn't that great either which I think stings much more with just how stacked 2026, 2027 and 2028 are going to be for gaming. Most of the exciting announcements were for remakes/remasters that a lot of people already knew were coming so there wasn't much surprise factor
label: analysis

text: Geoff is moving like this is the first time he’s seen the Tupac reveal LMAOOOO
label: reaction

text: Man I'd be so pissed if I'd paid for a trailer spot and they showed it out of sync with the audio.
label: reaction

text: Whoever is in charge of the audio / video is fucking up so bad. This delay is horrible.
label: reaction

text: Can’t believe they got Tifa from Street Fighter for this Final Fantasy game
label: hot_take

text: I’m basically only here due to Guild Wars 3 hopium
label: reaction

text: These Chinese soulslikes are all starting to merge into one.
label: hot_take

text: Im expecting Half-Life 3, Bloodborne 2, Red Dead Redemption 3, and Portal 3. If I don’t see all of these I will be tweeting Geoff my disappointment.
label: hot_take

text: God nobody does art direction like Remedy, Control Resonant is already looking like one of the most visually striking games I’ve ever seen
label: analysis

text: No, seriously, how much money is being spent on this jittery, desynced show? Has to be in the tens of millions, at least, right?
label: analysis

text: Can we keep celebrities dead? This shit is so dumb...
label: hot_take

text: Everything is looking... Extremely fun and good? Loving this so far
label: reaction

text: Lost me at 3v1, should have been a Survival Horror with very heavy puzzle focus.
label: analysis

text: I can't stop laughing at Sonic x Evangelion
label: reaction

text: Geoff Keighley's shows are always so much more chaotic and unpredictable compared to E3. We could just get like 100 Soulsborne clones one after an other like last year, we could get banger after banger like a couple of Geoff shows.
label: analysis

text: A racing game with a proper, deep narrative is very interesting.
label: analysis

text: I'm, uh, not sure how to feel about them putting Tupac in when can't consent since he's , y'know, dead.
label: analysis

text: The gameplay is so stuttery in all these trailers. I'd be so mad if I was one of the studios having my game premiered like this.
label: analysis

text: IOI kind of invested single player live service with Hitman and looks like they are doing the same thing with 007 which is very cool.
label: analysis

text: So instead of Soulslikes, are we getting Wukonglikes now? At least this one is just straight gameplay. And Chinese fantasy/mythology for the game world is fresh and new for now.
label: analysis

text: You'd swear that gamers actually hate games based on a good chunk of the comments you're seeing.
label: hot_take

text: So are they going to tell us if they're ai-ing Tupac's voice or are they just using a sound-alike?
label: analysis

text: Haex looks alright but it makes me think just... games look great now. We got over a barrier where games didn't all look great.
label: analysis

text: I always forget how toxic livestream comments are. Unmoderated cesspit.
label: reaction

text: There should be more franchise games that are like XCOM. Midnight Suns was great.
label: analysis

text: Devs at Capcom must be on cocaine. Their output is insane.
label: hot_take

text: Can't say a remaster for Wolf Among Us is totally necessary considering it's still playable on modern platforms, but I can't turn down an excuse to replay it again
label: analysis

text: An incredibly weak show. Audio desync issues throughout the show, how hard is it to get this right? You've had 6 prior attempts to perfect the technical side.
label: analysis

text: Dude I don’t want to play as this 13 year old femboy in a skin tight bodysuit, stellar blade was already kind of pushing it for me in terms of how weird it was
label: hot_take

text: Rebirth sold under 5 million copies. I personally love the series, but the remake trilogy cannot be remotely compared to GTA even in the JRPG space right now
label: analysis

text: Persona 6 is probably the most anticipated jrpg over ff7 part 3 or ff17
